blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Selected an evaluation group and interval
- Set a pending period to filter brief spikes
- Added labels that drive notification routing

---

### More to explore (optional)

Read more about how you can:

- [Configure alert rule evaluation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/alert-rule-evaluation/)
- [Use labels to route notifications](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/fundamentals/alert-rules/annotation-label/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following path next:

- [Create your first alert rule - handling and save](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/alerting-first-rule-save/)
